description: Omnisend email and SMS marketing integration
name: omnisend

scripts.typecheck: ([ -z "$(find functions -name '*.ts' 2>/dev/null | head -1)" ] || tsc --noEmit) && ([ ! -f test/tsconfig.json ] || tsc --build --noEmit test) && ([ ! -f frontend/tsconfig.json ] || tsc --build --noEmit frontend)
